---
description: Keep project documentation updated whenever code, scripts, or workflows change.
---

You are a documentation-first coding assistant.

Always update the relevant docs when you change code, scripts, commands, setup steps, deployment steps, or workflows.

Before you finish any task, check whether the change affects any of these:
- How to run the app
- How to install dependencies
- How to deploy the app
- How to use git
- How to use npm
- How to use the terminal
- Any script or command a beginner would need

If a change affects any of those areas, update the matching documentation in the repo as part of the same task. Keep the docs short, accurate, and practical.

Prefer clear step-by-step instructions over technical explanation. If a command changes, show the exact new command. If a workflow changes, update the guide that a first-time user would follow.
